ai_summary: Gujarat Fluorochemicals Limited (GFCL) announced a two-day plant visit for investors and analysts to its material subsidiary, GFCL EV Products Limited's Battery Chemicals Plant, on July 16-17, 2026. This initiative indicates the company's strategic focus on the EV segment and aims to enhance transparency and investor understanding of its operations. No unpublished price sensitive information is intended to be shared, ensuring compliance with regulatory guidelines.
